meta.title: Automated Document Processing for Government Compliance | Yaakov Aglamaz
meta.description: How we built an AI system that automatically processes import documents, saves hours of manual work, and integrates directly with government systems.

documentAutomation.title: Automated Document Processing for Government Compliance
documentAutomation.subtitle: An AI system that turns hours of manual work into minutes

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.text: A company manages dozens of regulatory cases simultaneously. Each case requires processing 5-10 different documents — forms, approvals, financial reports, certificates, and compliance documents. Each document is manually entered into government systems — a process that takes hours and is prone to errors.
painPoints: 5+ hours of manual work per case
Data entry errors causing delays and fines
Experienced staff stuck on data entry instead of professional work
Unable to work outside office hours

solution.title: The Solution
solution.text: We built a system that receives documents, automatically identifies their type, extracts relevant data using AI, and submits reports directly to government systems.

features.title: Automatic Document Classification
features.description: The system automatically identifies the document type — form, approval, financial report, certificate — and extracts the relevant data.

features.title: AI-Powered Data Extraction
features.description: Claude AI analyzes document content, understands context, and extracts fields like amounts, dates, classification codes, and identifiers.

features.title: Automated Government Submission
features.description: The system generates submission files in the required format and submits directly — no manual data entry needed.

features.title: Real-Time Tracking
features.description: Every case status is updated automatically. Alerts for delays, deadlines, and required payments.

meta.title: Personal AI Assistant for Business Operations | Yaakov Aglamaz
meta.description: How we built an AI agent that runs 24/7, monitors systems, executes automated tasks, and maintains business applications autonomously.

useCaseAiAssistant.title: Personal AI Assistant for Business Operations
useCaseAiAssistant.subtitle: An AI agent that runs in the background, monitoring, maintaining, and operating business systems autonomously

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.text: A small business owner manages dozens of processes in parallel — lead tracking, website monitoring, code maintenance, backups, orders and deliveries. Each process requires manual attention, and things fall through the cracks as the day fills up.
painPoints: Dozens of routine tasks that get forgotten or delayed
Manual monitoring of websites and systems — only reacting after something breaks
Code maintenance and SEO deferred because there's no time
No complete picture of what's happening across all projects

solution.title: The Solution
solution.text: We built an AI agent that runs on a dedicated server 24/7. The agent monitors, diagnoses, and fixes issues autonomously — an automated pipeline from problem detection to fix and deployment.

features.title: Automated Monitoring & Diagnostics
features.description: The agent scans systems, checks website health, SEO status and Google indexing — and reports structured findings.

features.title: Automated Code Fixes
features.description: When issues are detected, a separate maintenance agent reads the diagnosis, fixes the code, builds, tests and pushes to production — without intervention.

features.title: Scouting & Alerts
features.description: Daily scanning of platforms to find business opportunities, with a structured digest sent directly to Telegram.

features.title: Task Management & Scheduling
features.description: Automated scheduling of backups, reports, monitoring and maintenance — everything runs without waiting for someone to remember.

metrics.label: From issue detection to production fix

meta.title: AI WhatsApp Chatbot for Financial Consultation | Yaakov Aglamaz
meta.description: How we built a smart WhatsApp bot that conducts financial consultations in natural language, collects client data, and routes hot leads to advisors.

useCaseMortgageBot.title: AI WhatsApp Chatbot for Financial Consultation
useCaseMortgageBot.subtitle: A bot that conducts consultations in natural language, qualifies leads, and passes only the relevant ones to the advisor

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.text: A financial advisor receives dozens of inquiries per week via WhatsApp. Each inquiry requires an initial 15-20 minute conversation to understand needs and collect basic data. Most inquiries aren't a fit, and the advisor wastes hours on screening instead of advising.
painPoints: Most inquiries aren't relevant — wasting valuable time
Leads lost because the advisor isn't available 24/7
No organized tracking of inquiries and client data

solution.title: The Solution
solution.text: We built a smart WhatsApp bot that conducts consultation conversations in natural language. The bot collects all required data, classifies the lead, and passes only hot leads to the advisor with all information ready.

features.title: Natural Language Conversation
features.description: The bot conducts human-like conversations — asks contextual questions, doesn't repeat itself, and adapts its tone to the client.

features.title: Automatic Data Extraction
features.description: AI extracts structured data from the conversation — loan type, property details, income, employment status — without forms.

features.title: Lead Classification & Routing
features.description: The system classifies each lead (hot, call tomorrow, not interested) and alerts the advisor only when needed.

features.title: Management Dashboard
features.description: Full dashboard with conversation history, lead data, filtering and search — everything in one place.

metrics.label: Lead response time — instead of hours
